title: First Derm - Teledermatology Platform
problem: Patients need quick dermatology advice but face long wait times for appointments, delaying diagnosis and treatment.
solution: On-demand teledermatology platform connecting patients with board-certified dermatologists for asynchronous consultations within hours.
technology: Mobile app, secure image upload, telemedicine platform, store-and-forward technology
regulatory_notes: CE marked in EU, operates globally
varden_fit: HIGH - Teledermatology access and routing directly aligns with Varden's model. Good EU expansion opportunity.
notes: Strong EU presence. Asynchronous model scalable. Good fit for dermatology routing.
